name: Okta Network Zone Modification Events (30 days)
description: Detects successful Okta network zone modification events that can weaken IP/geolocation controls.
query: SELECT l.uuid AS id, l.actor_id, COALESCE(actor.login, actor.email, l.actor_id, l.actor_type, 'unknown') AS actor_name, l.target_id, l.target_type, l.event_type, l.outcome, l.published FROM okta_system_logs l LEFT JOIN okta_users actor ON actor.id = l.actor_id WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(l.event_type, '')) IN ('zone.update', 'network_zone.rule.disabled', 'zone.remove_blacklist') AND LOWER(COALESCE(l.outcome, 'success')) IN ('success', 'allow', 'allowed') AND l.published >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL '30 days'
remediation: Review network zone modifications for unauthorized trust expansion, revert unsafe changes, and enforce tighter change controls for zone updates.
